cycle_notes: Initial policy — play only clearly +EV spots. No speculation. No bluffing.
core_principle: Only enter pots with the hand. When you have it, play it perfectly. When you do not, fold immediately.

preflop.reasoning: Tight preflop range — only open hands that are clearly profitable. IP wider because position has value.

flop.reasoning: Bet for value only. Trap strong hands OOP. Overbet when board pairs our cards — reference bots do not adjust.

turn.reasoning: Continue value betting on turn only when hand strength holds. No semi-bluffs yet.

river.reasoning: Value bet river only. No bluffs until logs show opponents fold river enough to make it profitable.

constraints: NEVER raise or bet without EHS meeting the minimum for that street
NEVER call if pot odds require equity we do not have
NEVER bluff unless bluff_enabled=true AND specific conditions are met
ALWAYS play trap (check then check-raise) with EHS above trap threshold
ALWAYS overbet when board pairs our hole cards and EHS above board_hit threshold
